programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: History'S Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: (PG) Explorers use advanced tech to search the Bermuda Triangle for Flight 19. Along the way, they uncover lost ships and clues to why these waters remain so deadly.

programme.title: History'S Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: (PG) Mike Fletcher leads a team to find a Nazi U-boat rumored to be carrying stolen gold and art. Using evidence left by treasure hunter Roger Miklos, they hunt for the wreck.

programme.title: History'S Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.
